requirements.task_name: Add 3 paying Bitcoin HYIP programs with ≥3% daily ROI and ≤$20 minimum deposit to your watchlist
requirements.task_description: User must end up with 3 watchlisted programs matching the specified financial criteria.

requirements.task_name: Bookmark the better-paying HYIP among two programs running 10–60 days based on 30-day total return
requirements.task_description: User must compare two specific paying programs (running 10–60 days) and bookmark the one with the higher 30-day total return.

required_variables.set_condition: When getProgramDetailView(programId) successfully loads a program whose status === 'paying' and running_days is between 10 and 60 (inclusive), append this programId to an internal list of compared IDs if it is not already present and the list currently contains fewer than 2 IDs.
required_variables.value_to_set: An object like { "comparedProgramIds": ["program_123", "program_456"] } stored via JSON.stringify; on each qualifying call, read existing object (or default {comparedProgramIds: []}), push programId if needed, and save back.
required_variables.reason: Tracks exactly which two paying programs running 10–60 days the user opened for comparison. The evaluator can then verify that the bookmarked program is one of these two and that it has the higher total_return_30d_percent.

required_variables.set_condition: When saveProgram(programId, save_type, ...) is called with save_type === 'bookmark' and the corresponding program has status === 'paying' and running_days between 10 and 60 (inclusive), and localStorage does not yet have a non-empty task2_bookmarkedProgramId value, set this variable to the current programId.
required_variables.value_to_set: The string programId, e.g., "program_123". If task2_bookmarkedProgramId is already set to a non-empty value, leave it unchanged.
required_variables.reason: Records which qualifying program the user chose to bookmark for this comparison task, without altering normal bookmark behavior. Combined with task2_comparedProgramIds and programs.total_return_30d_percent, the evaluator can confirm that the bookmarked program was one of the two compared and has the higher 30-day total return.

requirements.task_name: Post a 4-star review with a 2+ sentence comment on a specific HYIP program discussion
requirements.task_description: User must post a 4-star, multi-sentence review for the program 'CryptoMax 300%'.

requirements.task_name: Create a new forum thread announcing a hypothetical HYIP with clearly specified plan details
requirements.task_description: User must create a thread in the 'New HYIPs' category with the specified title and structured body.

requirements.task_name: Add 2 short-lived high-minimum 'Scam/Not Paying' HYIPs to your personal blacklist and subscribe to scam alerts
requirements.task_description: User must blacklist exactly two qualifying problematic programs and enable scam alerts.

requirements.task_name: Vote in a community poll for a newly started 5-star paying HYIP launched within the last 7 days
requirements.task_description: User must cast a poll vote on a qualifying program (paying, started within 7 days, payout rating 5/5) with a cautious option.

requirements.task_name: Configure your dashboard to show only active programs with ≥1.5% daily ROI in USD and enable in-site risk alerts
requirements.task_description: User must update account settings to enforce specific dashboard filters and notifications.

requirements.task_name: Send a private message to the latest commenter on a HYIP asking about their payout experience
requirements.task_description: User must message the most recent commenter on a program discussion, with a clear subject and at least two specific questions in the body.
